burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant LUTS burden and QOL impact

vulnerablePopulations: rural men with limited urology access
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DRE and PSA evaluation, IPSS symptom score, urinalysis; ultrasound and uroflowmetry when available

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Tens of millions of men with LUTS
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to urologists limits care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical evaluation in primary care; PSA and ultrasound more available in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Alpha-blockers and 5-ARIs; TURP for refractory cases; limited access to newer minimally invasive options
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Urologist shortages and delayed presentation due to stigma
